description_long: This humanoid robot features a blocky, voxel-style design with a predominantly white, orange, and gray color scheme. Its head is rectangular with a single blue circular element on the forehead, possibly representing a sensor or camera. The torso is segmented and mechanical, with visible joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for articulated movement. The arms and legs are composed of multiple segments, with orange forearms and hands that have distinct, finger-like extensions. The robot's feet are broad and flat, providing stability, and the overall build is slender yet robust, suggesting mobility and dexterity. The surface appears hard and smooth, with no visible clothing or external coverings beyond integrated panels.
description: A blocky, articulated humanoid robot with white, orange, and gray panels, featuring a blue sensor on its head and segmented limbs for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's face with a blue sensor, outstretched arms, and symmetrical segmented limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the robot's profile, showing the rectangular head, arm, and leg segments in alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, torso, and legs, with visible joint structures and orange panels on the arms and feet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg segments.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose; legs straight and parallel, head facing forward, torso upright.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only integrated colored panels and mechanical components.
attribute_facial_features: Face has a single blue circular sensor on the forehead, no visible mouth or nose, and blocky geometric features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have finger-like extensions; limbs appear articulated for a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Single blue circular sensor on the forehead, likely a camera or visual sensor.
